question: Will CIEN's market close price on 2026-06-28 be higher than its market close price on 2026-06-21? Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price. Resolution criteria: Resolves to the market close price at https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/CIEN for the resolution date. If the resolution date coincides with a day the market is closed (weekend, holiday, etc.) the previous market close price is used. Background: Ciena Corporation, a network technology company, provides hardware, software, and services for various network operators in the Americas, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, the Asia Pacific, Japan, and India. It operates through Networking Platforms, Platform Software and Services, Blue Planet Automation Software and Services, and Global Services segments. The Networking Platforms segment consists optical networking, routing, and switching products and services. This segment products include the 6500 Packet-Optical Platform, Waveserver modular interconnect system, the 6500 Reconfigurable Line System, and coherent pluggable transceivers; and the 3000 family of service delivery platforms and the 5000 family of service aggregation, as well as the 8100 Coherent Routing platforms and virtualization software. The Platform Software and Services segment offers navigator network control suite; and software subscription services, consulting, network migration and integration, installation and upgrade support services, and technical support solutions. The Blue Planet Automation Software and Services segment inventory management, orchestration, route optimization and analysis, and unified assurance and analytics software; and sells subscription, installation, support, consulting, and design services related to the Blue Planet automation platform. The Global Services segment provides services for advisory and enablement, implementation, and maintenance, support, and learning activities. Ciena Corporation was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Hanover, Maryland.

evidences.title: New Morningstar Analyst Report for Ciena Corp | Morningstar
evidences.content: ## Business Strategy and Outlook Ciena is the second-largest optical network communication equipment vendor in the world. The company’s products provide communication services providers, web-scale providers, and large enterprises with high-speed network hardware and accompanying software to allow rapid transfer of huge amounts of data over long distances. With global IP traffic poised for an approximately 20% compound annual growth rate through 2020, we expect demand for optical transport equipment to remain healthy. ## Share This Report ## Company Report Archive ## Sponsor Center ## Transparency is our policy. Learn how it impacts everything we do

evidences.title: Ciena Q2 2026 Earnings Preview — June 4, Street Expects $1.45 EPS - Alphastreet
evidences.content: Ciena operates in the communication equipment sector, where demand cycles are driven by several key factors investors should monitor. The company’s business typically reflects spending patterns from telecom carriers deploying 5G infrastructure, cloud titans building out data center interconnects, and cable operators upgrading their networks. Fluctuations in these customer segments can create quarterly volatility, making it essential to parse not just aggregate numbers but also the composition of revenue across end markets and product categories. Any commentary about backlog levels, order timing, and customer mix will provide critical context for understanding whether the current growth rate is sustainable. [...] What to Watch: Focus on gross margin performance alongside the revenue beat or miss—profitability quality matters as much as growth rate at this scale. Listen for commentary on order momentum and backlog conversion rates, which will indicate whether demand remains robust. Pay close attention to customer mix between service providers and web-scale customers, as these segments have different margin profiles and growth durability. Management’s Q3 guidance will be critical f...

evidences.title: Ciena Strategy and Business Model
evidences.content: Ciena is a communications networking company focused on high-capacity optical transport, routing and switching, network software, and related services. Founded in 1992 and headquartered in Hanover, Maryland, Ciena sells primarily to communications service providers, cloud and internet-platform operators, cable and broadband operators, governments, and selected enterprises. The company sits in the telecom and networking-equipment industry, where customer spending can be cyclical but long-term demand is supported by rising bandwidth consumption from cloud computing, video, mobile data, and, increasingly, artificial intelligence workloads.
